error_string: Copy-paste error in backend migration error message

required_files.rationale: Contains the error message templates for backend migration. Fix corrects a copy-paste error where one migration scenario displayed the wrong message.
Caller that references the error constants from meta_backend_errors.go. Agent must trace from error display back to this file to understand which constant is used.

error_chain: User runs backend migration (terraform init with backend change)
Migration code in meta_backend_migrate.go selects error message template
Wrong error constant is referenced due to copy-paste
User sees error message that doesn't match their situation
trigger_conditions: Specific backend migration scenario triggers the wrong error template
Error message content doesn't match the actual migration operation
